violations.description: Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
violations.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one

violations.description: Ensure the contentinfo landmark is at top level
violations.help: Contentinfo landmark should not be contained in another landmark

violations.description: Ensure the main landmark is at top level
violations.help: Main landmark should not be contained in another landmark

violations.description: Ensure the document has at most one main landmark
violations.help: Document should not have more than one main landmark
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
